title: July 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 25''' is the 206th day (207th in leap years) of the year, with 159 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[David Esch]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Alex Wald]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Anthony Forrest]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Troy Kotsur]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Mur Lafferty]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] published. The cover date is October.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 74|''Star Wars Weekly'' 74]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 58|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 58]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids '' 4]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 32|''Star Wars'' (1998) 32]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' 25th Anniversary edition reprint published.
*[[2005]] – [[Alf Joint]] dies.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 6: Endgame]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 4|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 4]] published.
*2012 – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 1|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 1]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Club Penguin Star Wars Takeover|''Club Penguin Star Wars'' Takeover]] occurs inside Disney's ''[[Club Penguin]]''.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.49]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Test]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Battlefront II: Inferno Squad]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Hero]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Jedi Academy: The Force Oversleeps]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 2]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 22|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 22]] published.
*2018 – [[Lando - Double or Nothing 3|''Lando - Doule or Nothing'' 3]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 12|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 12]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[The Ninth Jedi (manga)|''The Ninth Jedi'']] manga adaptation published in Japan.
*[[2023]] – [[Padawan (novel)|''Padawan'']] reprinted in paperback.
<noinclude>
